hypothesis: After six non-improving rounds, the next valid move is a fundamentally different architecture: add explicit router-driven support selection to the strongest current low-K backbone (`lowrank_two_stage_soft_codebook_residual`) so the model can allocate its tight `K=8` budget more adaptively after soft-codebook coarse reconstruction.
summary: Integrated a new family `routed_lowrank_two_stage_soft_codebook_residual` under `sparsify/`, added config validation and runtime dispatch, and passed the exact instantiate/forward/backward smoke test at `(architecture=routed_lowrank_two_stage_soft_codebook_residual, K=8, EF=12)`. This satisfies the severe-stagnation policy by pivoting to a new architecture rather than another minor hyperparameter tweak, while keeping the experiment anchored at the critical allowed low-K point.
self_review: This is a real architecture pivot, not a parameter tweak: it changes support selection dynamics on both sparse stages while preserving the winning soft-codebook coarse path. Integration risk is low because the exact launch string passed smoke on CUDA. Scientific risk remains moderate: routing previously crashed in an older family and support-selection changes have often underperformed at low K, but this variant is better targeted because it starts from the current best low-K backbone instead of a weaker base.
notes_to_memory: r91 introduced `routed_lowrank_two_stage_soft_codebook_residual`, a new prototype that adds explicit router-driven support selection to the current best soft-codebook two-stage low-K backbone.
Exact integration smoke passed for `routed_lowrank_two_stage_soft_codebook_residual` at `K=8`, `EF=12` on CUDA.
This round satisfies severe-stagnation policy by switching to a fundamentally different architecture instead of continuing LR/AUX tuning.
next_hypotheses: If `routed_lowrank_two_stage_soft_codebook_residual` wins at `K=8`, test the same family at `K=16` under the same recipe to see whether routing helps beyond the tightest low-K anchor.
If it is close but still behind at `K=8`, compare the same family at `K=16` before discarding it, because routing may help more once stage budgets are slightly less constrained.

If it clearly loses at `K=8`, conclude that extra routing on top of the soft-codebook backbone is not the missing ingredient and pivot next to a different structural family rather than more support-selection variants.
